display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（CSS 注释剥离急救测试版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: strips CSS comments inside <style> only when code-block rescue or one-shot plain-text rescue actually runs, preventing SillyTavern/Markdown comment corruption from causing missing-brace CSS errors, while preserving prompts, source pools, visual styling, and all existing features.
